title: Can you change the item ID?
excerpt:
Hello there, 
Question are you able to edit generating the ID Number. 
Example ID number generated by monday.com 623677836 
9 Digits generated. But I want to decrease the digit number to 5 like 62367. Or even maybe be ab…

posts.author: melih (Melih Bas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

Question are you able to edit generating the ID Number.

Example ID number generated by monday.com 623677836
9 Digits generated. But I want to decrease the digit number to 5 like 62367. Or even maybe be able to include some letters like YX623.

Is that possible?

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml: @melih If you are referring to board, user and item IDs, by their nature, they can’t be changed.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @melih
There is an alternative, see my post on Auto-ID column (more dynamic) - #21 by basdebruin and some discussion here Auto-ID column (more dynamic) - #29 by basdebruin

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
All,

See my post at https://community.monday.com/t/monday-app-with-automations-released/ where I announce a monday App which includes the autoID column feature.
